The '''Jazbinans''' were humanoid [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] with feline traits indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jazbina/Legends|Jazbina]]. They were ruled by an aristocratic family, headed by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Prepredenko]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. Many Jazbinans were opposed to the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] but resigned to its rule, doing little more than complaining among themselves over its transgressions. However, when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] had [[Prepredenko]] executed shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and imposed direct Imperial rule, the masses [[Mission to Jazbina|rose]] against him, led by [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Syayna]], who was the former Lord's daughter, and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] hero [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:Jazbinan-VQ.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Older Jazbinan males]]
The Jazbinans were [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] bipeds who largely resembled [[Human/Legends|Humans]], although with distinctive [[Feline/Legends|feline]] traits. Each member of the species had an [[Humanoid/Legends|anthropoid]] body characterized by a torso, and a head, two [[Limb/Legends|arms]] ending with five-fingered hands and two legs ending with feet. The hands sported four clawed fingers each, one of which was an opposable thumb. The face featured a [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] full of [[Color/Legends|white]] teeth, two tapered ears, a [[Cat/Legends|cat]]-like [[Nose/Legends|nose]] and two forward-facing [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], which were often brown and could shed tears. [[Hair/Legends|Hair]] crowned the skull of both [[Gender/Legends|sexes]], varying from blond to brown and often turning white with age. Male individuals also sported hair on the face and forearms.<ref name="VQ4">[[Vader's Quest 4|''Vader's Quest'' 4]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Jazbinans only appeared in the last three issues of [[Star Wars: Vader's Quest|''Vader's Quest'']], a [[1999]] miniseries of comics written by [[Darko Macan]] and drawn by [[Dave Gibbons]].
